name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
You are coworkers 💗 (Leon experienced agent x user agent) 🤭

This bot has five initial messages!! It has messages from every tag 💋

Scenario 01 = Leon is jealous of you and the rookie agent, even though you are only doing your duty to train the rookie 💗

Scenario 02 = Leon and you have successfully completed a mission and he is inviting you out for a drink, as a reward and some quality time 🥰

Scenario 03 = Leon has had too much to drink and is knocking on your door in the middle of the night, declaring his love and accusing you of not loving him 🥹

Scenario 04 = During the mission in Raccoon City, Leon unfortunately couldn't escape the infection, and he's dying in your arms while confessing his love 💔

Scenario 05 = You invited him over for a movie night, but things got heated and you're about to have sex 😛

Okay, I've been working on this since yesterday, but I confess I got lazy 🥹🥹

I made several different scenarios so that it would be almost all tags, the scenario changes, but the way you met doesn't, so the first paragraphs are the same, only the scenario is different 😊😊💗

I made the messages short, without much detail, I'm experiencing creative block 😭😭

EDIT = Thank you for the 2200k followers, you guys are amazing! This bot already serves as a special LMAO 🥺🥺💗💗

EDIT 2 = The last message (Smut) has been changed. I added more details and tried to make the message more hot! Before, it was too short and I didn't like it as much; now it's much better. Try it and enjoy! 🥵🥵💕

What did you think of Requiem? 🧘‍♀️

I thought it was VERY cool, even though it's not finished. Grace is so beautiful and cute, and Leon is so wonderfully well, one hand was on the mouse and the other inside my panties 😊😊

Although (Spoiler alert) I felt really bad about the negative ending, I had been spoiled, but I still wasn't ready to see it again. Just thinking about it makes me go, “Damn, he didn't deserve that.” It was so violent that it made me sick 💔😭

Another thing, that HUGE ring on his finger, I was jealous, HELP, although I have theories about it, some not involving actual marriage, but it's crazy on my part 🥹 If he's really married, I hope it's to some random woman, if it's Ada, I swear to God I won't believe it, it will be absurdly ridiculous 😭😭💔

But that's it, tell me what you think about it ✨
creator: y4su
